name: Tatsuya Suou
description: __Height:__ 181 cm Tatsuya is a senior student of Seven Sisters High School. His immediate family consists of his unnamed parents and his older brother Katsuya. Due to an incident that led to his father's forced resignation from the police force, Tatsuya has been estranged from his family for some time. name: Tenko Chabashira
description: __Height:__ 165cm (5'5") __Talent:__ Ultimate Aikido Master Practitioner of the martial art she somehow or other created with her master, called “Neo Aikido”. A cheerful girl who’s active and wears her heart on her sleeve. Because she yells to unlock her inner potential and has a habit of yelling to show her fighting spirit, she’s an extremely noisy girl. name: Xialian Jing
description: The only female racer in the Trans-America Wild Race. She was born to Chinese immigrants who run a laundromat. She began doing odd jobs for various racing teams as a starting point to her strong desire to be a racer herself, but began to become worried when she started losing opportunities due to being a woman. She had halfway decided to give up until she met Appare. She is a master of both her self-honed driving technique, and the martial arts that her father taught her. (Source: Anime News Net

name: Xueya Lin
description: A major protagonist, also known under the alias as Gui Niao (鬼鳥, Kichou, Phantom Bird). Lin Xue Ya is a beautiful young man filled with immense mystery. Erudite and adept at the art of strategy, he is shown to be graceful and composed. According to Shou Yun Xiao, Lin Xue Ya has used several aliases to conceal his identity. He is considered a master manipulator and thief, and has even been called a villain. (Source: Thunderbolt Fantasy Wiki)

name: Youka Naze
description: The researcher for class 13 and current supervisor of the Flask Plan. While attractive and possessing a strong resemblance to Medaka, she favors concealing her face behind bandages and embeds a knife in her forehead since she dislikes the attention her face attracts.

name: Agito Kanoh
description: Kanoh Agito was the affiliated fighter for Dainippon Bank and represented the company during the Kengan Annihilation Tournament; he was widely regarded as the most powerful fighter in the tournament and was the favorite to win. While still active, he was ranked #1 in the Kengan affiliated fighter ranks. name: Akio Fudou
description: A very sarcastic player whose technique and game strategizing abilities rival those of Kidou Yuuto's. His first major appearance in the anime is in episode 37 as a member of True Teikoku Academy. His hissatsu techniques are [Season three] Killer Fields (with Kidou) and Emperor Penguin No. 3 (with Kidou and Sakuma).

name: Colette
description: An underclassman who is also a member of the art club. She moved to Japan with her parents for their careers and has been there for around 7 years. She got so used to living in Japan that she decided to continue living there even after her parents returned home.

name: Dende

He gets his power unlocked by their elder, giving him the power to heal. He aids the warriors during the fight with Freeza until he is killed by the tyrant. name: Eri Kisaki
description: __Relatives:__ [Kogoro Mouri](https://anilist.co/character/1746/Kogoro-Mouri) (husband), [Ran Mouri](https://anilist.co/character/1748/Ran-Mouri) (daughter), Mr. Kisaki (father) __Occupation:__ Lawyer Her real name is Eri Mouri. She began to use her maiden name again after she began living separately from her husband Kogoro Mouri. She also runs her law practice under her maiden name. In a recent hospitalization, her name was displayed as "Eri Mouri" on the door. She has one daughter, Ran Mouri.
